reviews.review_description: They need to be sued.. The players are very disrespectful.. I have to look over my shoulder every time I'm playing slots. I report people but the harassment gets worse. There is no way I can record. So many children are simulation drinking and smoking. So much effort was put in the creation. No monitoring. I report bad behavior but it's relentless.. They need to be sued..

reviews.review_title: They rob you while you play
reviews.review_description: I recently won some money on the new slot machine and I made it to 123,023,344$ so I stopped playing the slots,and this happened while I was playing at a 5k table with my friends. So after about ten minutes of not playing slots and opening my watch to check my daily missions I noticed I somehow only had 114 million dollars and I was quite confused as to how I lost 9 million dollars at a 5k table in ten minutes and then I realized that Vegas infinite robbed my while I was playing poker with my friends lol like what the hell how are you gonna explain that to me and when will I ever get my money back? The answer is they won’t explain it and won’t give me my money back bc they are a bunch of money grubbing hors

I paid for stuff in this game with my own money and I can't reset my password to get into my account because they won't send an email. Very disappointing, won't recommend. They just take your money and say "scrw you." This is genuinely the worst account recovery I have ever experienced. Not playing again (I haven't gotten my account back). I have linked it to Meta, but since I deleted the game, it seems to completely forget who I am. Very disappointing. Quick tip: don't spend money on this game whatsoever.

People complaining just suck at gambling 🤔😂😂😂 this game is awesome. I only play the MTT and some slots. The cash games have a lot of donkey players, probably the ones complaining about the game because they call with anything and get mad when they loose. Overall great game. I do wish they would release more varieties of packs more often!!!

If you wanna feel bad about yourself, constantly lose money, and be ruthlessly insulted by strangers with racial slurs, violent threats and horrible personal attacks… then this is the game for you! 

The best way to play this game is to uninstall it from your headset, and never go near it ever again.

Vegas Infinite asks me for a review everyday!! Here it is then!!
I signed out of game center and now I have to log in 3X just to get into the game.  Then you wait for a good hand and when you call or raise it, you get disconnected and lose the money that you have already put in?
DO NOT PAY $$ AT ALL!!! This game crashes on me every MTT that I have played!  I have logged in everyday for the past 5 years.  The disconnections on iOS have made this game unplayable!!! How can you try to play a poker game when it disconnects anytime that you have a playable hand???
That's just iOS!!! How about playing on my headset where any time you click the meta button, it removes everyone's voices at the table?? Problems with disconnection on the headset as well!!
Remember when you could invite your friends to join you at a table and play?  They took that out and totally screwed the social aspect of getting together with your buddies to play!!! WHY?????

FIX YOUR GAME!!! YOU ARE LOSING PLAYERS DAILY!!!!

reviews.review_title: Don’t listen to the bad reviews
reviews.review_description: All the reviews I’ve read say you have to be pay to win or the game is rigged. I’ve spent $.99 on a starter pack for 250k and have made my way up to 5 mil in a week. Everyone saying it’s rigged has never seen a real casino lol. Just don’t waste real life money, if you run out wait for the wheel. There’s no incentive to spend money

developer_response.body: Thanks Strucids! We appreciate you sharing your experience and the kind words 😄 Glad you're having a great time at the tables!

I have spent alot of real money on this game and it seems like it sets you up to lose way more often to make you buy more chips. If you spend real money they should give you a better winning chances instead of screwing you over   ￼

I was playing blackjack (poker cards) and i got a 21 and the Ai got 22 and i still lost. And this game is full of racism and toxic people and i got my voice chat taken cus i said hi. The creator needs to be sued to because now i cant buy anything.
WOULD NOT RECOMMEND

You guys really need a block feature. Some people been playing for years now new people and the racism is too much. I don’t even want to play anymore. You guys mute my mic because I’m taking up for myself from racists. That’s on brand though. Put a block feature back. I’m ending my subscription too.

It’s really fun. Don’t listen to the other people saying you won’t have fun cause you will if you buy the start pack for 99p or something in American dollars are not too sure but you get 250 K that’s so much to start with and you get an additional 40 K and that sets you up really well it’s super fun. It’s not glitchy. It won’t rob you with your money and you will have fun. You’ll make friends and Vegas infinite if you’re reading this review, please can you can you give me 100 more?

Things were smoothing when I started playing like 4/5months ago. Now I’m getting like glitches tweaks all the time. N I’ve talked to n overheard it everywhere especially in Texas hold em. Each time I try to enter app from headset to a place infinite it goes thru tye process I’m at a table then I’m bak in my suite. When I go to pick up items or chips I can’t, then it’ll unfreeze and it had me fold or it put chips in I wudnt have done. I need to connect customer support I thought with the updates by now things would b getting better. It’s just getting worse at the moments. Those are just a couple off the top of my head but there’s other things too.

I've had to reinstall the app about a dozen times recently (almost every time i want to play) because it fails to launch. 
In game, i will lose chat audio if i dare touch my Meta menu button. When that happened, i can't hear my friends unless i leave and rejoin the table.
I really wish i could queue for a full table.
I would love to be able to pick my preferred seat at the poker table.
Aside from all that, fun game!

reviews.review_title: Good but not enough money making ways
reviews.review_description: This game is good, however, if you run out of chips then you're done. The only way to earn more chips is by the daily wheel and buying more. But most of the time the daily wheel doesn't pay enough. Maybe there could be other ways to earn chips.

*** update 6/1/26 ***  Game has really gone downhill fast. Can never get on a hold em table within my chip limit any longer...been like 4 months now maybe more...that every table I get sent to has a higher chip limit than I have. Harassment has also gotten much worse. Sad because the game used to be fun.



I like the game overall. Would be better if it was easier to get into games. Many times it puts you on a table by yourself. Another issue is too many people wanting to mess around with the props and not play cards. Would be nice if there was a way to have proper free tables you could select.

￼ Voice chat does not work. I can hear people, but people cannot hear me. I’ve tried everything to fix it and nothing will work. I know I have not been banned because it has not been working for over five months. Please fix this issue.
￼

It used to work fine about 2 years ago but now it won't go past the loading screen no matter how many times you uninstall and reinstall. Headset is updated in everything.
Really sad.

The kids on here are wild, I really wish they would get them under control. I can guarantee that if I join a table there will be at least one child. Other than that they have really worked hard on fixing those crashing bugs, still kinda happens for the multi-table tournaments but it’s bearable.

Most people complaining here have skill issues and don't know how the game works. The moderation is good and if people bother you, then simply block them. I rarely see kids and when I do they usually get terminated.

I can’t speak as to the other games, but the poker is great. There are some bad apples, in terms of players, but you can genuinely just mute them. I’m not sure if the game is rigged at all to be frank. I’ve had bad hands, good hands, great hands, etc. If you know how to play poker, you’re going to love the game. 

Props are expensive but frankly you earn currency as you play. Just save and you can get them. Likewise, you get what you put into the game in terms of friendliness. I’ve been gifted several high value table items by people who were genuinely just having a great time. 

I recommend

I was on a craps table betting on the one roll bets and I was betting on 9 10am 4 that’s the hat I always doo but all the student non of the numbers hit for over 50 rolls losing me all of my money even after I spent money I really don’t appreciate this

This game has really cool features and it's well worth your time this games distracts you if your feeling stressed or something like that you can meet cool people and have a lot of fun highly recommend it

It’s fine for the first time you play at the moment you deleted or clear the data you’re un allowed to go back in for the west of the time it just keeps you on the loading screen no matter what you do

Don’t install this trash game you’ll just lose to the members people every time, how does the same person flop quads within 4 hands? Oh that’s right, they pay for the membership. This game just favors the try hards who spend real money. Get a different poker app, this one is straight up trash.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your concerns.
We understand how tough streaks can feel, but please be assured that our random number generator (RNG) is independently certified and regularly audited to ensure fairness across the board. It has been recently re-certified as of 2026, so you can have confidence that the game is certified fair and random. Outcomes are entirely based on chance, with no influence from the system or players. Players who make in-app purchases or subscribe to our monthly Club membership do not receive any additional advantages that would tip gameplay odds in their favor.
If you have questions, our team is always here to help clarify: https://help.vegasinfinite.com/en/

reviews.review_description: The language that is used at these betting tables is unbelievable. The name-calling and harassment is the reason why I deleted the game. If you like rude teenagers, who think they’re cool  and ￼completely disrespectful play this game.

It’s a good variety of games, my favorite one is casino one just because of all the different games. But the players are the cons, every now and then you will get those players. But overall pretty fun game!

reviews.review_title: DO NOT SPEND YOUR MONEY IF ON GUEST
reviews.review_description: I have been playing the game for years now and have been really enjoying it, especially when a update comes out. However recently I have logged on to see that they have removed the "guest" option. That had everything, over 80 props and 30 million. Definitely going to uninstall and find something else. Not worth getting to same point just for my account to be wiped for some random reason.

Only thing I've found is 
since that latest update I can only spin the slots 50 times then the machine goes black so I change to next machine spin once that goes blank 
.this issue still hasn't been fixed .tried reinstalling it still the same .

I was playing this game and I’m over 18 and I got banned because of voice chat detection and just because my voice Is high I get banned. Good game but stupid moderation 
￼

I’m 23 and someone Reported me and now I can’t play because it says I’m too young but I am 23 I have a wife and kids it was my favourite game I even spend real money on the game so if you could Unbanned me please that would help￼
Very good game but I was banned fro some reason but very high quiatly it really funny when u meet a new player who doesn't understand poker so u always win because ethey bet all the chips

Cash grab.   
 Fun: it can be. 
 Cheating system: 100%
 Props are far over priced. (Gamble chips and prop $ is two different things) $currency to buy personal props.  Which the currency is far over priced for what you get as well.  (So be sure to play as much as u can during holiday times and community events) 
  Am I a club member?  Unfortunately yes.  -_- 
  Will this game draw you in?   Of course it will.  
       But be aware. It is a game with devs leaning on $ currency.  House. Always. Wins.  2/150 times you’ll get lucky against the house. A house table. Craps. That 7 will always hit. Unicorn when it doesn’t .   Free spin every 8 hrs. Many options it can land on. But it’s basically chance of 1 of 400 you’ll land on something over 20k chips. 13k is the main sweet spot it seems.   Overall. For beginners , It’s fun if u have friends to join. If u have Start up $ in ur bank to play with. (Least a $20 pack)     5 stars just because I like the game.  Financial wise tho. One star with a “Ross” bump. “If u know friends u know wtf I mean”

Plays like a real casino, as in you will win huge sometimes. most of the time if you're smart with your money you can float along pretty well. sometimes you lose a lot just play safe and good to go!

**UPDATE**

Seems they have gotten greedier than they have been before. the more/higher you bet, the faster you lose, and I don't mean just by the bet, i mean 7's come out more, dealer get 20-21 more and slots don't hit, if you bet big, you're absolutely sure to lose 8/10 times. as a person who has sunk $1000's into this game and ive never ONCE been a billionaire is ridiculous. i just purchased a $150 pack, went to craps 5 million buy in, first roll 7, ok no Biggy, 2nd roll 5, put money out on number 2 million each, 3rd roll 7, alright wtf, 4th roll 5 again, money goes out, then you guessed it, 5th roll 7. cool F craps passed that. finally getting a point. put my 5million in bets out, and guess F***ING what... 7. lost it all. seems odd to me that 7 pops up so much. anyway, go to Blackjack, dealer gets 20, 20, 21, 21, 21, 19 and I'm broke. 2 million a hand to try to get back what i had lost in craps. BUT oh, wait i drop my bet to 10k and i win 90% of my hands for an hour???? WTF 

But hey you know what? your "RNG system has been certified and proven to be one of the best"... my a$$, yeah like 10 years ago, time to get it re-certified and adjust you win/loss odds. people who spend actual money in this game, (like hundreds not $5), deserve an edge just like if you're a club member after like a year you should get a house edge. 

Do better because your RNG calculator is f***ing garbage

reviews.review_title: It feels like the games are rigged
reviews.review_description: Between the scheming algorithms that make sure you lose when they want, attempting to compel you to buy more chips from them$$. Now with the multi platform players, people playing from phones and computers, it takes away from the VR Quest experience. This app has gone downhill ever since the name change. Glitches galore with every new update. Don’t get me started on the useful but excessive monitoring, mostly for Political Correctness, which ends up stifling normal table chat that you would experience in a real casino. I say make the games pay out more often then the real casinos do so we can get more enjoyment out of this app.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your concerns.

We understand how tough streaks can feel, but please be assured that our random number generator (RNG) is independently certified and regularly audited to ensure fairness across the board. It has been recently re-certified as of 2026, so you can have confidence that the game is certified fair and random. Outcomes are entirely based on chance, with no influence from the system or players. In-app purchases are completely optional and do not affect gameplay outcomes.

We appreciate your feedback on the cross-platform experience, updates, and moderation, and we'll be sure to pass it along to our team.

If you have questions, our team is always here to help clarify: https://help.vegasinfinite.com/en/

reviews.review_title: Please allow us to create BOT-FREE table
reviews.review_description: I understand the logic of filling empty seats with bots, but is there any way to remove or ban them from certain tables? Every time I sit at a table, it quickly becomes overrun with bots. I think most players would rather play shorthanded with 3 humans and 4 empty seats, than have 3 humans and 4 bots at a table. I noticed many players abandon the tables when there are 2-3 bots. I do the same, but new bots end up appearing. Can't we create a bot-free table?

developer_response.body:
Hey MortalHamster, thanks for the feedback! Just to clarify, Vegas Infinite does not use bots at any of our tables. All players you encounter are real people.

If you have any further questions, our team is happy to help: https://help.vegasinfinite.com/en/
